target_market_label.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦（Kyrgyzstandart / 国家能源控股）
target_market_label.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦（Kyrgyzstandart / 國家能源控股）

title.en: China-to-Kyrgyzstan Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入吉尔吉斯斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入吉爾吉斯斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Kyrgyzstan EAEU/EAC electrical safety and EMC obligations, Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC evidence, NEHC/NESK/NEGK grid-connection review, IEC 62109 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface behavior, IEC 61000 EMC context, 220/380 V 50 Hz grid settings, and high-altitude / cold-climate derating expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与吉尔吉斯斯坦EAEU/EAC电气安全及EMC义务、Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC证据、国家能源控股/NESK/NEGK并网审查、IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口行为、IEC 61000 EMC背景、220/380 V 50 Hz电网参数，以及高海拔/寒冷气候降额要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與吉爾吉斯斯坦EAEU/EAC電氣安全及EMC義務、Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC證據、國家能源控股/NESK/NEGK併網審查、IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面行為、IEC 61000 EMC背景、220/380 V 50 Hz電網參數，以及高海拔/寒冷氣候降額要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EAEU TR scope determination, Kyrgyzstandart conformity decision, NEHC/NESK/NEGK grid-connection approval, customs determination, tender qualification decision, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, designers, and installers should verify current Kyrgyzstan, EAEU, Kyrgyzstandart, Ministry of Energy, grid-operator, customs, project-owner, high-altitude, and cold-climate requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, tender submission, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EAEU技术法规适用范围裁定、Kyrgyzstandart符合性决定、国家能源控股/NESK/NEGK并网批准、海关裁定、投标资格结论或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、投标或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行吉尔吉斯斯坦、EAEU、Kyrgyzstandart、能源部、电网运营商、海关、项目业主、高海拔和寒冷气候要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EAEU技術法規適用範圍裁定、Kyrgyzstandart符合性決定、國家能源控股/NESK/NEGK併網批准、海關裁定、投標資格結論或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、投標或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行吉爾吉斯斯坦、EAEU、Kyrgyzstandart、能源部、電網運營商、海關、項目業主、高海拔和寒冷氣候要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Kyrgyzstan, the baseline route is not China GB/T acceptance. Kyrgyzstan is an EAEU member, so in-scope electrical/electronic inverters commonly need EAEU conformity under TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage equipment and TR CU 020/2011 EMC with EAC marking before placement on the market. Project delivery then depends on Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC evidence, grid-operator connection approval through NEHC subsidiaries such as NESK distribution companies or NEGK transmission, IEC 62109 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface behavior, and firmware validation for 220/380 V at 50 Hz, with additional attention to mountainous high-altitude and cold-climate derating.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口吉尔吉斯斯坦时，基线途径不是自动接受中国GB/T。吉尔吉斯斯坦是EAEU成员，因此落入范围的电气/电子逆变器通常需要按TR CU 004/2011低压设备和TR CU 020/2011 EMC完成EAEU符合性评价并加施EAC标志后，方可投放市场。项目交付还取决于Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC证据、通过国家能源控股旗下NESK配电公司或NEGK输电公司的并网批准、IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口行为，以及针对220/380 V、50 Hz电网的固件验证，并应额外关注山区高海拔和寒冷气候降额。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口吉爾吉斯斯坦時，基線途徑不是自動接受中國GB/T。吉爾吉斯斯坦是EAEU成員，因此落入範圍的電氣/電子逆變器通常需要按TR CU 004/2011低壓設備和TR CU 020/2011 EMC完成EAEU符合性評價並加施EAC標誌後，方可投放市場。項目交付還取決於Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC證據、通過國家能源控股旗下NESK配電公司或NEGK輸電公司的併網批准、IEC 62109安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面行為，以及針對220/380 V、50 Hz電網的韌體驗證，並應額外關注山區高海拔和寒冷氣候降額。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
